TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear1__oemaw a _obay

S.FORM: hayza' 'aehae' ka tatini'.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人。
There was an old man.

S.FORM: rima' ila ray pamowa'an ka boboway.
S.TRANSL: 去了果園。
(He) went to an orchard.

S.FORM: 'isaa o: minboway ila ka niya pamowa'an.
S.TRANSL: 他的果園長了水果。
The trees that he planted have borne fruits.

S.FORM: rokrok ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人去摘水果了。
The old man went to pick the fruits."

S.FORM: 'isaa o: rokrok ka boway 'oka' 'araS ka kala'.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果，可是都沒有帶著籃子。
He picked fruits, but he did not bring any basket."

S.FORM: niya noka 'obos noka kaybae:en tino kala' 'ano o: isaza.
S.TRANSL: 就用衣服的口袋來當作他的籃子。
(so he used) his clothes-pocket for a basket.

S.FORM: 'araSen o: ta'as ila ray (r)ay ra:i' 'isaa ka kala' 'aSkan hayza (r)ay ra:i'.
S.TRANSL: 帶著就放在 ... ... 地上，地上有一個剛放下的籃子。
There was a basket put on the ground.

S.FORM: 'isahiza ka tatini' rima' ta'itol ila ha:o babaw o: rokrok ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人爬到樹上那邊，在摘水果。
The old man went up the tree to pick fruits there.

S.FORM: o: isaza 'aehae' mae'iyaeh nila 'ima hoehoeh ka 'aehae' ka Siri'.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有一個人拉著一頭羊。
A person came pulling a goat.

S.FORM: y~a niya 'inaz'azem koSa: o: hini ka hoehoeh ka Siri' 'am mwa:i' ma tatilhaehael ka hini ka tatini' mo rokrok ka ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 他心想，這個拉著羊的人要來幫忙這個老人摘水果。
(He) thought this (man) pulling a goat has come to help the old man pick fruits.

S.FORM: 'isaa o: 'isaa ka hoehoeh ka Siri' lososo:oi: ilaha:o kabih.
S.TRANSL: 那個拉著羊的人一直走走到另外一邊去了。
(But) that (man) pulling a goat proceeded on his way.

S.FORM: hini o: ina rorol 'aehae' ka ka korkoring 'am 'ima papama' ka kapapama'an ka kapapama'an noka korkoring.
S.TRANSL: 這個有一個跟在後面 ... ... 有個小孩騎著他的腳踏車。
A child riding on his bike followed.

S.FORM: 'isaa o: ka tatini' 'okay sahoeroe' ka 'isaza ka korkoring.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人沒有看到那一個小孩。
The old man didn't see the child.

S.FORM: tatini' ha:o ray kaehoey babaw 'okay sasahoeroi.
S.TRANSL: 老人在樹上面那邊，（所以）沒有看到。
(Because) the old man was up in the tree (and) didn't see.

S.FORM: 'isaza ka rokrok ni baki' ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人摘下來的水果，
There (were) the fruits picked by (the old man).

S.FORM: ray ra:i' 'askan roSa' ila ka kala'.
S.TRANSL: 摘了兩個籃子放在地上。
There were two baskets on the ground.

S.FORM: 'inak'ino' 'isaa korkoring.
marma' 'aehae' kala' niya 'araSen papama' ka kapapama'an.
S.TRANSL: 不知道怎麼了那個小孩偷了一個籃子，騎著腳踏車帶走了。
The child (suddenly/unexpectedly) took one basket and rode on his bike.

S.FORM: 'isaa ka tatini' kaSra:i' ila ay 'inaray kaehoey babaw.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人從樹上下來。
The old man climbed down from the top of the tree.

S.FORM: kita' ka nisia rokrok ka kala'.
S.TRANSL: 看著他採的幾籃（水果）。
He saw the basket (of fruits that he) picked.

S.FORM: komoSa: hayno' ila hini ma'an rokrok ka 'aehae' kala' ka boway hini.
S.TRANSL: 說道：我剛剛採的那一籃水果跑去哪裡了呢？
And he said, where has one basket (of fruit) I picked gone?

S.FORM: o: 'isaza korkoring o: kilwa'is ila ma' rima' 'ae'ae:aew ila rima'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子奮力地跑走了。
(The child) rode his bike with all his might and ran away.

S.FORM: sia nak'ino.
S.TRANSL: 他結果怎麼了呢？
What on earth happened?

S.FORM: komoSa: yo 'aehae' naehaen ka korkoring mwa:i' ray ra:an.
S.TRANSL: 在路上又有一個小孩子來了。
Later on the road came another child.

S.FORM: roSa' ila sasbong ila ka kapapama'an ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 兩輛腳踏車相遇。
On the road, two bikes crashed.

S.FORM: ila malben ila ray ra:i'.
S.TRANSL: 從腳踏車上跌到地上，摔得一踏糊塗。
(Two bikes) fell on the ground.

S.FORM: hiza ka boway ray kala' sisae:aeh ila ray ra:i'.
S.TRANSL: 那籃子裡的水果都灑出來到地上去了。
The fruits in the basket fell all over the ground.

S.FORM: hiza 'ima haebae:aen ka korkoring kita' koSa: anh 'ampowa ila hini korkoring malben ray ra:i'.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有很多小孩看到就說：這個小朋友怎麼跌到地上了呢？
Those (three) children saw (the fall) and said 'what's with this child who fell on the ground?

S.FORM: Sa kita'en hini' ka boway ray ra:i' sisae:aeh ila.
S.TRANSL: 看到了這些水果倒出來撒在地上。
They went and saw; the fruits have fallen all over the ground.

S.FORM: kita'en ka korkoring noka saboeh rokrok hini ka boway o:.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩子一起撿水果。
(We) see that all the children then (worked) together to pick up the fruits.

S.FORM: 'askanen o: ray kala'.
S.TRANSL: 放在籃子裡。
(They) put (the fruits) in the basket.

S.FORM: nak'isaza ka korkoring rokrok ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 像那樣子小孩子一起撿水果。
This way the children were picking up the fruits.

S.FORM: sia nak'ino 'isaa.
S.TRANSL: 他怎麼會這樣呢？
What on earth has happened?

S.FORM: ka korkoring kin 'ae'aewhay o:.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩都那麼壞，
These children were really bad.

S.FORM: ma: marma' hiza ka boway ma: 'araSen ila si'aelen ila roSa'.
S.TRANSL: 也偷走了那些水果，還吃了兩個。
They have not only stolen the fruits, but have also taken and eaten two.

S.FORM: oh 'isaza o: komoSa: hiza tatini tatini' koSa: o:.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個老人說，
Then the old man said,

S.FORM: ma'an hini ka 'aehae' hahila 'ma rokrok ka boway hini o: hayno' ila ma' 'aehae' kala'.
S.TRANSL: 我花了一天採的水果到哪裡去了呢？
Where has the basket of fruits which I have picked today gone?

S.FORM: ki:im ki:im ki:im 'okay tihoeroei o:.
S.TRANSL: 找呀找呀找呀沒有找到。
He looked for (the fruits), but did not find (them).

S.FORM: 'isaa komoSa: ay nisia ra:amen komoSa: hini ka korkoring mwa:i'.
S.TRANSL: 他可能想說這個小孩已有來過。
The child (children) came.

S.FORM: hini' noka korkoring 'araSen ila ay ka hini ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 這個水果被小孩子帶走了。
This child took this fruit.

S.FORM: hm koSa: ma' 'ana nak'isaa 'al'alak So: korkoring si'ael ka hini ka boway ma' 'ampowa 'aewhay.
S.TRANSL: 雖然那些水果被小孩子吃掉了，那也不錯。
Although that (the child took the fruit away), there's nothing wrong with the child's eating the fruit.

S.FORM: kayzaeh o:.
S.TRANSL: 也不錯呀!
Good.

S.FORM: yami tatini' 'ana 'okay si'ael ma' kayzaeh ila o:.
S.TRANSL: 我們老人即使沒有吃也還好。
It's all right even if we old people don't eat (the pears).

S.FORM: 'isa ma'an ka payaka:i' papay hini.
S.TRANSL: 我說的故事就到這邊。
My story ends here.

S.FORM: ma'alo'.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝。
Thanks.
